# Mesh Rendering

> 3D mesh data structures and rendering

**Category:** Integration · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** integration · godot

## What this does

3D mesh data structures and rendering

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Mesh Creation** — when Create mesh from vertices/indices is requested, then Create mesh from vertices/indices completed.
- **Mesh Vertex Data** — when Define positions, normals, UVs, colors is requested, then Define positions, normals, UVs, colors completed.
- **Mesh Index Buffers** — when Define triangle topology is requested, then Define triangle topology completed.
- **Mesh Primitives** — when Cube, sphere, cylinder, etc. is requested, then Cube, sphere, cylinder, etc. completed.
- **Mesh Morphing** — when Blend between mesh targets is requested, then Blend between mesh targets completed.
